flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Onondaga Community College rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.6k → $3.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Onondaga Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Onondaga Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (48.0% → 54.6%).
